summary: Iter 199 — Geofence Monitor (Phases 3-8), Fake-GPS punch forced-manual approval, and Proposals Phase-2 Convert-to-Customer. BACKEND: 7/7 pytest passed (test_iter199_geofence_and_convert.py). Verified (1) seeded 3 flagged attendance rows (offline+synced_at, mock_location, outside_geofence) for Kankani employee — GET /api/admin/geofence/monitor?company_id=cmp_527fecdd7c returns counts.offline>=1, counts.mock>=1, counts.outside>=1, counts.flagged>=3 and recent_flagged rows include employee_name + employee_code; (2) GET /api/admin/geofence/report?type=mock returns only mock rows, type=offline rows include captured_at + synced_at, format=csv returns text/csv with proper header (date, employee_code, mock_location, etc.), invalid type -> 400; (3) POST /api/attendance/punch as TEST50/123456 with mock_location:true, valid coords 25.3463,74.6408, biometric_method:face, tiny selfie -> 200 and the attendance record persists with status=pending and mock_location=True (server.py:8825 correctly sets field_auto=False on mock); (4) Proposals convert flow: create proposal 'TA Convert Test Ltd {uniq}' -> POST /admin/proposals/{id}/convert returns ok with company_id+company_code+agreement_id; companies doc has source=proposal_conversion, contact_person, gst_no; client_agreements doc active with services; proposal.status=converted; 2nd convert returns already_converted:true; new proposal with SAME client name -> 409 duplicate firm name. All seeded/created data cleaned up (verified 0 leftovers in db.attendance/companies/proposals/client_agreements). FRONTEND: /geofence-monitor renders correctly for super admin — 6 KPI cards (Total Punches, Offline Synced, Fake GPS Flagged, Outside Geofence, No GPS, Pending Approval), 3 range preset buttons (This Month/Last Month/Last 7 Days), 6 register tabs, CSV button — tabs & range switch work without error. Sub-admin testsub@sksharma.co/testsub123 direct URL /geofence-monitor -> Access Denied screen rendered with [data-testid=route-access-denied] + [data-testid=denied-go-home] visible, URL preserved (RBAC gating for /geofence-monitor works). FRONTEND 2 (proposals convert UI) BLOCKED by a new UI bug: /proposals page for super_admin calls GET /api/admin/proposals WITHOUT the active-firm company_id -> backend returns 400 'company_id is required' -> list shows 'No proposals yet' and Convert-to-Customer buttons never appear even after a proposal is created via API for the selected firm. The backend list endpoint DOES return the proposal when called with ?company_id=cmp_527fecdd7c (verified via curl). Convert endpoint itself was fully proven via backend test #4.

ui_bugs.issue: Page calls `api('/admin/proposals')` without passing the active firm's company_id from AdminWebShell context. For super_admin (who has no user.company_id), the backend responds 400 'company_id is required' — the UI displays this as an info banner and the list is empty even though proposals exist for the currently-selected firm. Consequence: the whole 'Convert to Customer' UI flow (green button per row) is unreachable via the UI. Reproduction: log in sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com/sharma123 -> pick Kankani Enterprises in firm picker -> /proposals -> banner shows 'company_id is required'. Verified via curl that GET /api/admin/proposals?company_id=cmp_527fecdd7c returns the proposal correctly (total:1). Fix candidate: proposals.tsx `load` and `submit` must pull the current firm's company_id (from useActiveFirm / route context / query param /?firm=) and include ?company_id=... on GET and in the POST body/create call.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend does not forward active firm company_id to /api/admin/proposals GET/POST -> list is empty, convert button never renders. Backend convert flow itself is 100% functional (backend test #4 passed for all 3 sub-cases: happy path, idempotent, 409 duplicate).

action_items: PRIORITY: Fix /app/frontend/app/proposals.tsx to include the active firm's company_id in all /api/admin/proposals GET/POST/convert calls when the logged-in user is super_admin. Currently the API calls omit company_id and the backend returns 400 for super_admin (no user.company_id). Pattern: `api('/admin/proposals?company_id=' + activeCompanyId)` for GET and `{ ...payload, company_id: activeCompanyId }` for POST create + `{ company_id: activeCompanyId }` for POST convert. AdminWebShell already exposes activeCompanyId via context.

After fix, re-run FRONTEND 2 flow: create 'TA UI Convert Ltd {uniq}' via New Proposal form -> row appears -> green Convert-to-Customer button (testID convert-{prop_id}) clickable -> confirms & shows 'Converted → Firm code XYZ' success -> row shows purple 'Customer' chip and status 'converted'.

OPTIONAL: The Staff-HR direct-URL RBAC redirect bug (iter 198) was not re-verified in this iteration due to context budget. Sub-admin gating works (verified). If staff-HR still redirects instead of showing Access Denied, that bug remains open.
critical_code_review_comments: proposals.tsx `load` uses `api('/admin/proposals')` with no query params — this breaks the page for any user that isn't a company_admin. Same issue on POST create (`api('/admin/proposals', { body: { client, services, pricing_input, proposal_types } })`). company_id must be added to the body / query for super_admin+sub_admin flows.

geofence_reports.py _guard() correctly forces company_id from admin for company_admin, but sub_admin also needs company_id in query — currently allowed. The 400 path is fine for super_admin without ?company_id=.

server.py:8825-8826 — the field_auto override for mock_location is a clean 2-line fix and correctly forces status=pending even when policy_mode=field + auto_approve=true. Verified in test_mock_location_forces_pending.

proposals.py convert endpoint (~L285-378) — clean idempotent design: converted_company_id stored on proposal, duplicate-name check with regex-safe escape, 409 with 'force=true' escape hatch. Companies + client_agreements docs both persisted atomically enough that partial-failure cleanup rarely needed.
geofence_reports.py monitor endpoint uses 20000-row batch which is fine for the current data volume; consider a hard month-cap if firms scale past ~5k employees to avoid memory pressure.

success_rate.frontend: Geofence monitor UI PASS; Sub-admin RBAC deny PASS; Proposals convert UI BLOCKED by list-load bug (company_id missing)

seed_data_creation: Backend fixture ITER199_ tags: 3 attendance rows in db.attendance (Kankani employee) — DELETED. 1 UI-side proposal 'TA UI Convert Ltd {uniq}' created via API — DELETED. Verified all counts back to 0 after teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_iter199_geofence_and_convert.py for regression — 7 tests self-contained, cleanup baked in. For FRONTEND 2 retest once proposals.tsx passes company_id: log super admin -> /proposals -> click New Proposal -> fill 'Company Name *' with 'TA UI Convert Ltd {uniq}' -> Create Proposal -> expect green testID convert-{proposal_id} button on the new row -> click -> accept confirm -> expect success info banner containing 'Converted → Firm' and code; on next render the row should show purple 'Customer' chip and 'converted' status.
rca_of_issue: Proposals convert UI unreachable — root cause: proposals.tsx `load()` at ~line 91 calls `api<ListResp>('/admin/proposals')` without appending the active firm's company_id. Backend _guard requires company_id when the caller is super_admin (has no user.company_id). Fix at load() to append `?company_id=${activeCompanyId}` and at submit() to include `company_id: activeCompanyId` in the payload. This will make the list render for super_admin and expose the convert button per row.
